zh.Hamelincourt: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈梅林古特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wallerland de BERLES於1153年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈梅林古特時，他的父親Auguste de Berles31歲，母親Adelise De Souastre20歲。他於1178年與Marie de Boisleux結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wallerland de BERLES于1153年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯哈梅林古特时，他的父亲Auguste de Berles31岁，母亲Adelise De Souastre20岁。他于1178年与Marie de Boisleux结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BERLES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alvaro, Jose, Carlos, Cesar, Florina, Gustavo, Luis, Margarita, Mariana, Mercedes, Ramon, Xavier.
German (Lower Rhine): topographic name for someone who lived on a hill, from a shortened form of   Berghaus  . Compare   Berkes  .

variants.name: Berghaus
meanings: German: topographic name denoting a house on a hill, a compound of Berg ‘mountain, hill’ + Haus ‘house’. Compare Berges .

variants.name: Berkes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.
North German: topographic name for someone who lived on a hill, shortened from Berg-hūs (Berg ‘mountain, hill’ + Low German hūs ‘house’). It is a variant of Berkus or Berges .
Hungarian: from a pet form of the personal names Bernát or Bertalan, Hungarian forms of Bernard and Bartholomew , respectively.

en.lifeSummary: When Wallerland de BERLES was born in 1153, in Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Auguste de Berles, was 31 and his mother, Adelise De Souastre, was 20. He married Marie de Boisleux in 1178. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wallerland de BERLES est né en 1153, à Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Auguste de Berles, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelise De Souastre, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Boisleux en 1178. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wallerland de BERLES 1153 in Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Auguste de Berles 31 und seine Mutter Adelise De Souastre 20. Er hat 1178 Marie de Boisleux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wallerland de BERLES è nato il nel 1153 nel Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Auguste de Berles, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adelise De Souastre, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Boisleux nel 1178. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wallerland de BERLESが1153年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスハムリンコウルトで生まれた時，父Auguste de Berlesは31歳，母Adelise De Souastreは20歳であった。1178年にMarie de Boisleuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wallerland de BERLES(이)가 1153년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 해밀링쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Auguste de Berles(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise De Souastre(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1178년 Marie de Boisleux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wallerland de BERLES nasceu em 1153, em Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Auguste de Berles, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelise De Souastre, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Boisleux em 1178. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wallerland de BERLES родился в 1153 г. в местности хамелинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Auguste de Berles было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelise De Souastre, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Boisleux в 1178 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wallerland de BERLES nació en 1153, en Hamelincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Auguste de Berles, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelise De Souastre, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Marie de Boisleux en 1178. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1217, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
